violations.text: Food items in the walk-in cooler and freezers were observed stored on pallets or floor racks less than 6 inches above the floor. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 06/19/2025

Wood is used in the construction of floor pallets in the walk-in cooler and for the hand sink cabinet in the kitchen area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 06/19/2025

The establishment is using a special process of jarring/preserving jams with added vegetables (Hot Pepper Jam). The product was voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection. For jarring of vegetable items or items containing vegetables, the establishment must get all recipes approved from a process authority and obtain approval from the RIDOH-Center for Food Protection prior to selling the above mentioned products. New Violation. Correct By: 04/19/2024

The establishment is using a special process of jarring/preserving jams, pickles, and relish without approval from a process authority and the RIDOH. The jarred jams, relish, and pickle products were removed from the retail sales floor at the time of inspection. Pickle and Relish items were voluntarily disposed of and Jams were placed under embargo at the time of inspection. The establishment must get all recipes approved from a process authority and obtain approval from the RIDOH-Center for Food Protection prior to selling the above mentioned products. See Embargo New Violation. Correct By: 04/18/2024
Several boxes of food items were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in freezer. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 04/18/2024

Wood is used in the construction of floor pallets in the walk-in cooler and for the hand sink cabinet in the kitchen area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 04/18/2024
